scripts.db:migrate: bash -c 'if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo "ERROR: DATABASE_URL not set"; exit 1; fi; prisma migrate dev'
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: bash -c 'if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo "ERROR: DATABASE_URL not set"; exit 1; fi; prisma migrate deploy'
scripts.db:push: bash -c 'if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo "ERROR: DATABASE_URL not set"; exit 1; fi; prisma db push'
scripts.db:seed: bash -c 'if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo "ERROR: DATABASE_URL not set"; exit 1; fi; tsx prisma/seed.ts'
scripts.db:reset: bash -c 'if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo "ERROR: DATABASE_URL not set"; exit 1; fi; prisma migrate reset --force'
